rationale: The citation is used in the methods section with explicit functional language: the authors state, "Following Dhar and Simonson (2003), we estimate one model to capture both shopping incidence and store choice." They then operationalize this by introducing a no-buy option alongside store alternatives in their utility and switching framework. This is more than background listing, because the cited paper directly informs how the core choice model is set up.
relation_description: The citing paper applies Dhar and Simonson's no-choice/forced-choice insight to a retail outlet-closure context by jointly modeling trip incidence (buy vs no-buy) and store selection. The cited work is used as methodological-conceptual guidance rather than being challenged or theoretically refined.
